key.name: notifications
key.description: Show a desktop notification when new mail arrives.

key.name: load-remote-images
key.description: Load remote images in messages by default instead of asking.

key.name: run-in-background
key.description: Keep checking for new mail after the window is closed.

key.name: sync-interval-minutes
key.description: How often to check for new mail. Set to 0 to check manually only.

key.name: signature-enabled
key.description: Add a signature to the bottom of outgoing messages.

key.name: signature-text
key.description: The signature appended to outgoing messages.
